_comment: Flow parked_taxi_eu — Regression: pilot requests taxi from PARKED at LSZR (Altenrhein). EU counterpart of flow_parked_taxi_us. Verifies that after removing the engines_running gate (2026-04-24), REQUEST_TAXI is accepted while stationary on ICAO/EASA-style Ground frequency with 'holding point' phraseology.
name: Parked taxi — LSZR Ground (EU)

say.note: Pilot calls Ground from PARKED (GS=0) for taxi. Must be accepted with EU 'holding point' phraseology.
say.text: Altenrhein Ground Hotel Bravo Lima Uniform Kilo at the apron request taxi
